query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_health_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  eventType ENUM('error','auto_correction','warning','info') NOT NULL,
  severity ENUM('info','warning','error','critical') NOT NULL,
  subsystem VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'server',
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  details JSON,
  autoCorrectAttempted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  autoCorrectSuccess BOOLEAN,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_health_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  overallStatus ENUM('healthy','degraded','critical','unknown') NOT NULL,
  healthScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  subsystemData JSON,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);
